The '''Alliance Needler carbine''' was a small carbine firing small sharp darts effective against personal shields. Used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it had a maximum range of 50 meters. [[Uff Wogo]] owned at least one of these before he was killed by [[Durge/Legends|"Project Durge"]], who then gave the weapon to a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] working for [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. The spacer handed this weapon over to Fett as proof that Uff was dead, then Fett returned it to him.

{{Weapon-stub}}
